# Marian Fusek

> Creative Director, Brand, UI, AI & Visual Designer, and Mindset Coach for digital creatives, founders, and leaders.

## Profile

Marian Fusek is a creative director and Brand, UI, AI & Visual Designer from Prague, Czechia. He develops brand identities, digital products, visual systems, creative direction, and AI-assisted visual production. He also provides mindset coaching and people-first team leadership guidance.

## Main page

- [Portfolio and profile](https://marianfusek.com/): Work, experience, coaching, leadership, biography, art, and contact information.

## Areas of expertise

- Creative direction
- Brand strategy and identity
- UI and digital product design
- AI-assisted visual design and production
- Visual design
- Mindset coaching for digital creatives
- Team leadership and people development

## Selected work

- MIUNĀE — Creative direction and brand system
- GoBaller — Brand and iOS app
- AIMS — Website, brand refresh, marketing and sales assets
- Vault 111 — Design experiments and visual work
- Side Quests — Community, product, academic and speaking projects
